drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 24 hours on day 1

regimens.notes: FLOT is a category 1 preferred perioperative regimen for resectable gastric or EGJ adenocarcinoma. It replaced the ECF regimen based on the FLOT4 trial. The regimen is given for 4 preoperative and 4 postoperative cycles. [1, 54]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 24 hours on day 1

regimens.notes: FLOT + durvalumab is a category 1 preferred regimen for patients with PD-L1 CPS ≥1 or TAP ≥1%. In the MATTERHORN trial, this combination improved event-free survival (EFS) when added to FLOT. It is also an option for clinical node-negative tumors (category 2A), PD-L1 CPS <1 or TAP <1% (category 2B), and diffuse type (category 2B). [2, 55]
This is a category 1 preferred perioperative regimen for patients with good to moderate performance status. The dosing is based on the FOLFOX regimen used in clinical practice. [52]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 24 hours on days 1-5

regimens.notes: Fluorouracil and cisplatin is a category 1 perioperative regimen. In the FNCLCC ACCORD 07 trial, perioperative chemotherapy significantly improved 5-year OS and DFS compared to surgery alone. [3, 52]

drugs.name: dostarlimab-gxly
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 3 cycles

regimens.notes: Dostarlimab-gxly is recommended for neoadjuvant therapy only in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. This is based on emerging data for neoadjuvant immunotherapy in this setting. [4]

regimens.regimen_name: Nivolumab and ipilimumab followed by nivolumab

drugs.name: ipilimumab
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 2 cycles

regimens.notes: This combination is recommended for patients with MSI-H/dMMR gastric tumors in the neoadjuvant or perioperative setting. In the GERCOR NEONIPIGA trial, 29 patients underwent R0 resection and 59% had a pathologic CR. [5, 253]

Pembrolizumab is recommended for patients with MSI-H/dMMR gastric tumors in the neoadjuvant or perioperative setting. In a phase II trial, neoadjuvant pembrolizumab showed an ORR of 82% with a pathologic CR rate of 65%. [6, 254]
Tremelimumab and durvalumab is recommended for neoadjuvant therapy only in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. In the INFINITY trial, the pathologic CR rate was 60%. [8, 9, 257]

Fluoropyrimidine-based chemoradiation is a category 1 preferred regimen for unresectable locally advanced disease if not previously received. In the INT-0116 trial, postoperative chemoradiation improved OS. [10-13, 58]

FOLFOX is a category 1 preferred regimen for unresectable locally advanced disease. In the PRODIGE5/ACCORD17 trial, FOLFOX-based chemoradiation showed similar PFS compared to fluorouracil and cisplatin. [16-18, 274]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

regimens.notes: Fluorouracil and cisplatin is a category 1 preferred regimen for unresectable locally advanced disease. [19-22]
Fluoropyrimidine and paclitaxel is a category 2B other recommended regimen for unresectable locally advanced disease. [23, 277]

drugs.name: trastuzumab
drugs.schedule: over 90 minutes initially, then 6 mg/kg every 3 weeks

regimens.notes: This regimen is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-positive adenocarcinoma. In the ToGA trial, trastuzumab plus chemotherapy improved OS. [24, 146]

drugs.name: trastuzumab
drugs.schedule: over 90 minutes initially, then 6 mg/kg every 3 weeks

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-positive and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. In the KEYNOTE-811 trial, the addition of pembrolizumab improved PFS. [25, 26, 352, 353]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

drugs.name: trastuzumab
drugs.schedule: over 90 minutes initially, then 6 mg/kg every 3 weeks

regimens.notes: This regimen is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-positive adenocarcinoma. [27, 146]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

drugs.name: trastuzumab
drugs.schedule: over 90 minutes initially, then 6 mg/kg every 3 weeks

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-positive and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. [25, 26, 352, 353]

This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. In the CheckMate 649 trial, nivolumab plus chemotherapy improved OS and PFS. It is a category 1 preferred option when CPS ≥5. [28, 360, 361]

This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. In the KEYNOTE-859 trial, pembrolizumab plus chemotherapy improved OS and PFS. It is a category 1 preferred option when CPS ≥5. [29, 354]

This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. In the RATIONALE-305 trial, tislelizumab plus chemotherapy improved OS and PFS. It is a category 1 preferred option when CPS ≥5. [30, 171, 172]

drugs.name: zolbetuximab-clzb
drugs.schedule: over 1 hour on day 1 of cycle 1, then 1000 mg/m2 every 3 weeks

biomarkers.requirement: CLDN18.2-positive (≥75% of viable tumor cells with moderate to strong membranous staining)

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and CLDN18.2-positive adenocarcinoma. In the SPOTLIGHT trial, zolbetuximab plus mFOLFOX6 improved OS and PFS. [31, 32, 173, 183]
FOLFOX is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative adenocarcinoma. [33, 34, 35, 279, 280, 281]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. It is a category 1 preferred option when CPS ≥5. [29, 354]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative and PD-L1 CPS ≥1 adenocarcinoma. It is a category 1 preferred option when CPS ≥5. [30, 171, 172]

drugs.name: fluorouracil
drugs.schedule: continuous infusion over 96 hours on days 1-4

regimens.notes: Fluoropyrimidine and cisplatin is a category 1 preferred first-line option for patients with HER2-negative adenocarcinoma. [33, 36, 37, 38, 279, 282, 283, 284]

biomarkers.requirement: MSI-H or dMMR tumor (independent of PD-L1 status)

regimens.notes: Pembrolizumab monotherapy is a category 2A preferred first-line option for patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors, independent of PD-L1 status. [39-42, 356, 357, 358]

drugs.name: dostarlimab-gxly
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 4 cycles, then 1000 mg every 6 weeks

regimens.notes: Dostarlimab-gxly is a category 2A preferred first-line option for patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. [43, 373, 374]

drugs.name: ipilimumab
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 4 cycles

regimens.notes: Nivolumab and ipilimumab is a category 2A preferred first-line option for patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. In the CheckMate 649 trial, this combination improved OS compared to chemotherapy. [28, 340]

biomarkers.requirement: MSI-H or dMMR tumor (independent of PD-L1 status)

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 2A preferred first-line option for patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors, independent of PD-L1 status. [28, 360, 361]

biomarkers.requirement: MSI-H or dMMR tumor (independent of PD-L1 status)

regimens.notes: This combination is a category 2A preferred first-line option for patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors, independent of PD-L1 status. [40, 41, 358]
FOLFIRI is a category 2A other recommended first-line regimen. In the FFCD 9803 trial, FOLFIRI was noninferior to ECF but with a more favorable safety profile. [44, 303]

regimens.regimen_name: Paclitaxel with or without carboplatin or cisplatin
regimens.notes: Paclitaxel with carboplatin is a category 2A other recommended first-line regimen. [45-49]
Docetaxel with cisplatin is a category 2A other recommended first-line regimen. [50-53]
Fluoropyrimidine monotherapy is a category 2A other recommended first-line regimen. [37, 54, 55]

regimens.regimen_name: Docetaxel, cisplatin or oxaliplatin, and fluorouracil (DCF)
regimens.notes: DCF is a category 2A other recommended first-line regimen. In the V325 trial, DCF improved OS and PFS compared to cisplatin and fluorouracil. However, it is associated with increased toxicities. [56-58, 304, 305]
Ramucirumab and paclitaxel is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen. In the RAINBOW trial, this combination improved OS, PFS, and ORR compared to paclitaxel alone. [59, 363]

Fam-trastuzumab deruxtecan-nxki is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen for patients with HER2-positive adenocarcinoma. In the DESTINY-Gastric01 trial, it improved OS, PFS, and ORR compared to physician's choice chemotherapy. [60, 61, 366, 367]
Docetaxel is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen. In the COUGAR-02 trial, docetaxel improved 12-month OS compared to active symptom control. [52, 53, 273]

drugs.name: paclitaxel
drugs.schedule: over 1 hour on days 1, 8, and 15 every 4 weeks

regimens.notes: Paclitaxel is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen. In the WJOG 4007 trial, paclitaxel and irinotecan showed similar OS. [48, 49, 62, 324]
Irinotecan is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen. In the AIO trial, irinotecan improved OS compared to best supportive care. [62-65, 271, 324, 325, 326]
FOLFIRI is a category 1 preferred second-line regimen if not previously used. [63, 66, 67]

drugs.name: trifluridine and tipiracil
drugs.schedule: twice daily on days 1-5 and 8-12 every 28 days

regimens.notes: Trifluridine and tipiracil is a category 1 preferred regimen for third-line or subsequent therapy. In the TAGS trial, it improved OS and PFS compared to placebo. [68, 330, 331]
Ramucirumab monotherapy is a category 1 other recommended second-line regimen. In the REGARD trial, it improved OS compared to placebo. [69, 333]
Irinotecan and cisplatin is a category 2A other recommended second-line regimen. [34, 70]
FOLFIRI plus ramucirumab is a category 2A other recommended second-line regimen. [71, 72]
Irinotecan and ramucirumab is a category 2A other recommended second-line regimen. [73]
Docetaxel and irinotecan is a category 2B other recommended second-line regimen. [74]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances)
regimens.notes: These TRK inhibitors are category 2A options useful in certain circumstances for patients with NTRK gene fusion-positive tumors. Larotrectinib showed an ORR of 79% in a pooled analysis. [75-77, 343, 344, 345]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for MSI-H/dMMR)
regimens.notes: Pembrolizumab is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. In KEYNOTE-158, the ORR was 30.8%. [42, 78, 79, 80, 355]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for MSI-H/dMMR)

drugs.name: ipilimumab
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 4 cycles

regimens.notes: Nivolumab and ipilimumab is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. [28]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for TMB-H)
regimens.notes: Pembrolizumab is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with TMB-H tumors. In KEYNOTE-158, the ORR was 29%. [42, 81]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for MSI-H/dMMR)

drugs.name: dostarlimab-gxly
drugs.schedule: over 30 minutes every 3 weeks for 4 cycles, then 1000 mg every 6 weeks

regimens.notes: Dostarlimab-gxly is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with MSI-H/dMMR tumors. [43, 373, 374]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for BRAF V600E)
regimens.notes: Dabrafenib and trametinib is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with BRAF V600E-mutated tumors. In the NCI-MATCH trial, the ORR was 38% with a median PFS of 11.4 months. [82, 346]

regimens.setting: Second-Line or Subsequent Therapy (Useful in Certain Circumstances for RET fusion-positive)
regimens.notes: Selpercatinib is a category 2A option useful in certain circumstances for second-line or subsequent therapy in patients with RET gene fusion-positive tumors. In the LIBRETTO-001 trial, the ORR was 44%. [83, 347]
